pattern_1.transformation: Parse date from 'Date_Collected' using format '%m/%d/%Y' in America/Denver timezone; convert to UTC ISO-8601 string.

Map depth increments to representative meters below surface: '0-5 cm' -> 0.025 m, '5-15 cm' -> 0.10 m, Excel-mangled '15-May' -> 0.10 m, and '15 cm +' -> 0.15 m. Range/lower-bound depths are approximations.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: Convert cm depths to meters by dividing by 100 after midpoint/lower-bound selection.

pattern_1.transformation: Coordinates are embedded in the payload for most rows. Rows lacking coordinates remain traceable by site_id; no separate location output is required for heldout_harmonized.csv.
Coordinates are embedded in the payload for most rows. Rows lacking coordinates remain traceable by site_id; no separate location output is required for heldout_harmonized.csv.

pattern_1.source_pattern: Location, Field_Site, Block, Plot, Replicate, Topographic_Position
pattern_1.transformation: Construct a stable site_id by concatenating location hierarchy, plot, replicate, and topographic position when present.

pattern_1.source_pattern: Soil Water Content (g H2O per gram  soil)
pattern_1.transformation: Coerce source soil water content to numeric and drop rows where this measurement is missing.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: None; source units are g H2O per g soil.

pattern_1.transformation: None; volumetric water content not reported in source. Populate with NA.
None; soil water potential not reported in source. Populate with NA.
